code_patches.original_code: ue_context_p = rrc_gNB_create_ue_context(assoc_id, msg->crnti, rrc, s_tmsi_part1, msg->gNB_DU_ue_id);
code_patches.line_numbers: after line containing "ue_context_p = rrc_gNB_create_ue_context(assoc_id, msg->crnti, rrc, s_tmsi_part1, msg->gNB_DU_ue_id);"
code_patches.description: This patch adds an else clause to handle unrecognized ue_Identity.present values. It ensures that if neither identity type is matched, a default context is created and an RRCReject is sent, preventing a segmentation fault.
